title: galium moranii subsp. aculeolatum
intro: Galium moranii subsp. aculeolatum, also known as prickly bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium moranii plant, a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of prickly bedstraw include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Prickly bedstraw can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
